CustomField.description: Checks to see if the "Rental Assistance Permitted" field on the property is in agreement with the "Development Allows Rental Assistance?" field on the development. They should be.
CustomField.formula:
IF(TEXT(Development_address__r.Development_Allows_Rental_Assistance__c) = "", "ERROR - NOT CONFIRMED",
IF(AND(TEXT(Development_address__r.Development_Allows_Rental_Assistance__c) = "Yes", Rental_Assistance_Permitted__c = FALSE), "ERROR",
IF(AND(TEXT(Development_address__r.Development_Allows_Rental_Assistance__c) = "No", Rental_Assistance_Permitted__c = TRUE), "ERROR",
"Good"
)))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Checks to see if the "Rental Assistance Permitted" field on the property is in agreement with the "Development Allows Rental Assistance?" field on the development. They should be.
CustomField.label: Rental Assistance Check
